queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the correlation between the absence of a checking account and elevated credit default risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of maintaining savings below 100 DM on the likelihood of credit risk events.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Research on the association between negative checking account balances and decreased likelihood of credit default.
